title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.848 - Regulation of excursion gambling boats exempt from certain provisions of administrative procedures law
text:
313.848.  Regulation of excursion gambling boats exempt from certain provisions of administrative procedures law. — The proceedings and activities under sections 313.800 to 313.850 are exempt from the provisions of sections 536.063 to 536.077, and the commission shall not be required to use procedures prescribed by sections 536.063 to 536.077 with respect to its administration of sections 313.800 to 313.850.
(L. 1994 S.B. 427) 
Effective 6-28-94
